content-right-description1:
Overview

This website is a documentation for the mod AR3 by Marvin.
Currently this documentation isnt completed at all and will need further development currently there are a few block entries, a few item entries and the first two guides. Planned are, finished entries and an documentation on configuration (dimension properties + asteroids + commands).
I (Elroen) developed this website with insperation of the documentation for the original advanced rocketry wiki, but with my own code and design.
